articles.author: Kevin Breuninger
articles.title: Judge blocks Trump's $100,000 H-1B visa fee - CNBC
articles.description: Trump had imposed the $100,000 fee in order to restrict the program, arguing that it has undermined U.S. security through the "replacement of American workers."
articles.content:
A federal judge on Monday vacated President Donald Trump's policy imposing a $100,000 fee for employers' H-1B visa applications.
The visa payment policy violated the federal Administrative Procedure… [+1746 chars]

articles.author: Daniel Dale
articles.title: Fact check: Trump told NBC that he never promised not to start a new war. He did, repeatedly - CNN
articles.description: President Donald Trump told a bunch of lies before he abruptly walked out of an interview that aired Sunday on NBC’s “Meet the Press.” One of them was about what he had promised Americans about war.
articles.content:
